headline: My Boss Says I Can’t File for Workers’ Comp—Is That True?
articleBody: It’s a common scare tactic, but most workers are covered regardless of what a boss claims. First, document your injury in writing immediately. Second, see a doctor and tell them it happened at work. Third, don't let a manager talk you out of filing your paperwork. If they still push back or threaten your job, that’s when you need a legal pro in your corner. Call us at 801-746-0290.
